title: SaaS Shelfware Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify the financial impact of unused or underutilized SaaS licenses, based on Lean and Six Sigma waste reduction principles.

inputs.label: Total Licenses Purchased
inputs.businessContext: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the current period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the current period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cari dönemde ödenen SaaS lisanslarının toplam sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im aktuellen Zeitraum bezahlten SaaS-Lizenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de licences SaaS payées pour la période en cours.

inputs.label: Active Users (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son 30 günde en az bir kez giriş yapan farklı kullanıcı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der verschiedenen Nutzer, die sich in den letzten 30 Tagen mindestens einmal angemeldet haben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'utilisateurs distincts qui se sont connectés au moins une fois au cours des 30 derniers jours.

inputs.label: License Cost per Month
inputs.businessContext: Monthly recurring cost per license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de la licence par mois

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly recurring cost per license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lisans başına aylık yinelenen maliyet (sabit ücretler lisans sayısına bölünür).
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlich wiederkehrende Kosten pro Lizenz, einschließlich aller Fixkosten geteilt durch die Anzahl der Lizenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût mensuel récurrent par licence, y compris les frais fixes divisés par le nombre de licences.

inputs.label: One-Time Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SaaS aracının devreye alınması, eğitimi ve entegrasyonu için toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten für Onboarding, Schulung und Integration des SaaS-Tools.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total d'intégration, de formation et d'onboarding pour l'outil SaaS.

inputs.label: Monthly Support & Admin Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring internal labor and third-party support costs to maintain the tool.

label_i18n.fr: Coût mensuel de support et d'administration

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring internal labor and third-party support costs to maintain the tool.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracı sürdürmek için yinelenen iç iş gücü ve üçüncü taraf destek maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wiederkehrende interne Arbeits- und Drittanbieter-Supportkosten zur Wartung des Tools.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts récurrents de main-d'œuvre interne et de support tiers pour maintenir l'outil.

inputs.label: Contract Months Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of months left in the current contract or commitment period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months left in the current contract or commitment period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut sözleşme veya taahhüt döneminde kalan ay sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Monate, die im aktuellen Vertrag oder Verpflichtungszeitraum verbleiben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mois restants dans la période d'engagement ou de contrat actuel.

inputs.label: Utilization Threshold for Waste
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean waste).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean waste).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif kullanıcıların toplam lisanslara oranının altında kalan lisansların raf malı (Yalın israf) olarak kabul edildiği yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der aktiven Nutzer im Verhältnis zu den Gesamtlizenzen, unter dem Lizenzen als Shelfware (Lean-Verschwendung) gelten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'utilisateurs actifs par rapport au total des licences en dessous duquel les licences sont considérées comme du shelfware (gaspillage Lean).

rules.message: Active users cannot exceed total licenses purchased.
Utilization threshold must be between 0 and 100.
Contract months remaining must be at least 1.

thresholds.message: Shelfware ratio exceeds 30% — immediate audit recommended.
Total waste cost exceeds $50,000 — escalate to procurement.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
